de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class ExpressionSVWrapper

  • java.lang.Object

      • recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
        • recoder.java.expression.Literal
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.ExpressionSVWrapper
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KeYRecoderExtension, SVWrapper, Serializable, Cloneable, Expression, LoopInitializer, ProgramElement, ReferencePrefix, SourceElement, Statement, TerminalProgramElement, ModelElement

extends Literal
implements Expression, LoopInitializer, KeYRecoderExtension, SVWrapper, ReferencePrefix
